seo.title: About Yordan Ivanov - Head of Data Engineering at Dext
seo.description: 16 years in tech, 9 in data. Head of Data Engineering at Dext. 4 M&A deals. I work with data professionals on the non-technical side of the job.

sidebar.title: Hey, I'm Yordan.
sidebar.currently: Head of Data Engineering at Dext

content.content:
Sixteen years in tech. Nine of them in data.

I run data strategy and engineering at Dext. I report to the Director and work directly with the CFO and CPTO. I own the data platform, the team, and the strategy behind both.

## What I've Done

I've been part of 4 M&A deals at Dext. 2 acquisitions, 2 mergers. I led the data due diligence each time. Evaluated what we were buying, what would break during integration, and what leadership needed to know before the deal closed.

## What I've Built

At Dext, I run the data strategy that powers our global capabilities.

*   Cut platform costs by 70% through better planning and pipeline optimization.
*   Moved executive reporting from weekly batch to near-real-time. 83% faster.
*   Unified data models across business lines so every department works from the same source of truth.
*   Grew the data function from one engineer to a cross-functional team.

![](/images/journey.png)

## How I Think About Leadership

I pick reliable, proven technology over whatever's new. I care about measurable impact, not activity. Every technical decision should connect to something the business actually needs.

If your stakeholders can't explain your data strategy back to you, it's not a strategy.

## Writing and Coaching

I write [_Data Gibberish_](https://www.datagibberish.com/), a newsletter for data professionals on the non-technical side of the job. Read by 7,500+ subscribers. I also [work with](/coaching) mid and senior data professionals on stakeholder communication, promotion business cases, and career strategy.
